testcase.name: test_main_download_video_with_quality
testcase.failure:
def test_main_download_video_with_quality(): runner = CliRunner() with patch( "apyrat.apyrat.Downloader._get_available_qualities", return_value=["480", "720", "1080"], ) as mock_qualities: result = runner.invoke( main, [ "https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I", "-q", "720", ], ) > assert result.exit_code == 0 E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = <Result SystemExit(1)>.exit_code
tests/cli_test.py:21: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_main_download_video_without_quality
testcase.failure:
def test_main_download_video_without_quality(): runner = CliRunner() with patch( "apyrat.apyrat.Downloader._get_available_qualities", return_value=["480", "720", "1080"], ), patch("click.prompt", return_value="720"): result = runner.invoke(main, ["https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I"]) > assert result.exit_code == 0 E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = <Result SystemExit(1)>.exit_code
tests/cli_test.py:32: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_get_quality_available
testcase.failure:
def test_get_quality_available(): > downloader = Downloader("https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/cli_test.py:36: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ apyrat/apyrat.py:39: in __init__ self.videos = self._get_available_videos() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ apyrat/apyrat.py:61: in _get_available_videos return [self._get_single_video_qualities(self.video_uid)] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ apyrat/apyrat.py:95: in _get_single_video_qualities ).json() ^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/httpx/_models.py:832: in json return jsonlib.loads(self.content, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <json.decoder.JSONDecoder object at 0x102ebf550> s = '504 Gateway Timeout\n' _w = <built-in method match of re.Pattern object at 0x102e998a0>
def decode(self, s, _w=WHITESPACE.match): """Return the Python representation of ``s`` (a ``str`` instance containing a JSON document).
""" obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) end = _w(s, end).end() if end != len(s): > raise JSONDecodeError("Extra data", s, end) E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Extra data: line 1 column 5 (char 4)
/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:340: JSONDecodeError

testcase.name: test_get_available_videos_single_video
test_default_quality

testcase.name: test_download_when_file_exists
testcase.failure:
mock_wget = <MagicMock name='download' id='4384707856'> mock_isfile = <MagicMock name='isfile' id='4384707920'>
@patch("os.path.isfile", return_value=True) @patch("wget.download") def test_download_when_file_exists(mock_wget, mock_isfile): > downloader = Downloader("https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I", "outputfile") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
